items.description:
🐶 PuppyM Plush 🌟

Embrace the adorable charm of PuppyM, inspired by the lovable member of Stray Kids! This plush creation captures the playful essence of the beloved artist, known for his endearing personality and captivating performances. With its soft fur and cute design, PuppyM is sure to become your new favorite companion.

Key Features:
🌟 Adorable plush inspired by a member of Stray Kids
🐾 Captures the playful spirit and charm of the talented artist
💖 Perfect for fans of Stray Kids and plushie enthusiasts alike
🎶 A delightful addition to any K-pop merchandise collection

Cuddle up with PuppyM and let his irresistible cuteness bring joy to your everyday life! 🐾✨

Follow me on Twitter #0V3RDRIVE_Dev

items.name: Locust Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Bring a sinister little companion to your avatar with the Locust Shoulder Pet, inspired by ancient swarm legends and eerie insect spirits whispered about in forgotten ruins.

Whether you’re building a dark sorcerer look, cursed wanderer outfit, post-apocalypse survivor, or creepy-cute collector style, this detailed shoulder companion adds a mysterious presence that people notice instantly.

⚡ Why this shoulder pet stands out:
✅ High-detail 3D locust with realistic texture
✅ Fits naturally on your shoulder with most outfits
✅Perfect for cursed, dark fantasy, swarm, or anime-inspired avatar styles
✅ Show love to the Locust crew & creator

Some say it follows powerful hosts… others say it chooses them.
Add your swarm companion today before it disappears into the wind.

tags:

items.name: Raw Darkness Vultures Hat
items.description:
Collab between Hyacinth UGC and Aeteris Fantasy
Purchase HERE: https://www.roblox.com/games/72687221433834/Exclusives-Limiteds-Hub
-
A hat worn by members of a pop group, many decades ago. This hat was customized for a performance of their hit song, Vulture. After their song rose to fame again due to the viral dance circulating on social media, official hats from the performance were created in honor of the song's resurgence decades later. The hat features a black fabric base, with high-quality resin pieces placed on top, most notably the vulture skull and the bone horns. The rims of the hat are adorned with metal-like spikes placed carefully around them. Lastly, the hat was textured to have a grungy, dark black metal look. Buy some of these hats for yourself!
-
Tags: Onyx, White, Black, Metal, Grunge, Horns, Sparkles, Chrome, Gem, Chains, Emo, y2k, Dark, Matte, Shiny, Cross, Goth, Trendy, Hat, Outlaw, Gun, Bone, Skeleton
-
Modeled by: @dremochek
Textured by: @raashid45
